name: cap-garuda-plugin
description: GIX — Unified AI pipeline for Capillary Loyalty Frontend. Single command from Jira ticket to verified, tested code. Includes ProductEx verification, build verification, visual self-evaluation, Figma-to-component mapping, 131 Cap UI Library specs, frontend guardrails, session memory, and rework loops.
author: Capillary Frontend Team

features.unified_pipeline: /gix command — Garuda Intelligent eXecution, single pipeline from Jira ticket to tested code (15 phases, interactive menu)
features.cross_repo_tracing: Traces patterns across target repo, cap-loyalty-ui, and other repos to find existing implementations
features.productex: PRD alignment verification after HLD, LLD, planning, and code generation
features.build_verification: Compile check with 3-retry auto-fix after code generation
features.visual_self_evaluation: Browser screenshot + Figma comparison + auto-fix (3 iterations)
features.cap_ui_specs: 131 Cap UI Library component specs as skill-based markdown
features.figma_mapping: Automatic Figma element → Cap UI Library component mapping
features.fe_guardrails: 12 guardrail categories (FG-01 through FG-12) with CRITICAL/HIGH severity
features.session_memory: Shared context across all phases (decisions, constraints, risks, terminology)
features.rework_loops: Downstream phases can send blockers upstream, circuit breaker after 3 rounds
features.confidence_levels: C1-C7 calibrated confidence on uncertain agent decisions
features.live_dashboard: HTML dashboard updating after each phase (dark theme, progress bar, Mermaid diagrams)
features.git_snapshots: Phase-level git tags (gix/<ticket>/phase-NN) for safe rollback
features.tutor: Read-only codebase teaching skill using Feynman+Socratic method
features.debug: Root cause analysis skill with session memory context awareness
features.knowledge_bank: Human-populated pre-session context that persists across pipeline runs
features.blueprint: Final stakeholder-ready HTML document with pipeline stats, diagrams, decisions, and results
features.confluence_auto_publish: Auto-publishes every phase artifact to Confluence as child pages under a run folder
features.internal_consultation: Agents consult ProductEx/cross-repo-tracer before asking user questions
features.parallel_spawning: Independent agents run in parallel (codebase-scout + cross-repo-tracer, parallel code-gen)
features.brd_validation_gate: Validates PRD contains concrete expected behaviours before proceeding
features.prerequisite_checking: Verifies required artifacts exist before each phase starts
features.mermaid_diagrams: HLD/LLD include Mermaid architecture and flow diagrams
features.approach_log: Separate decision log tracking what/why/who for every pipeline decision
features.incremental_memory: Session memory updated after every decision, not batched at phase end
features.prototype_analyzer: Analyzes v0.dev, Vercel previews, or any prototype URL — screenshots + DOM inspection + component mapping to Cap UI Library
features.multi_design_input: Accepts Figma, prototype URL (v0/Vercel/any), or screenshot as design reference
features.guardrails: Exit checklists on all 15 agents + gate checks on all 6 commands
features.session_journal: Auto-written after each phase for resume across sessions
features.shared_rules: skills/shared-rules.md — single source for coding patterns
